span.p:
validate_custom_test_profile_by_access_link
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: 링크/검사/배정 검증 후 문항 payload 반환

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
함수 내부 순서
1) link 조회
2) custom_test 조회
3) 배정 내담자 검증
4) build_custom_assessment_question_payload 호출

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
배정된 내담자 + 입력 profile 일치?
(분기 함수: validate_custom_test_profile_by_access_link
app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
build_custom_assessment_question_payload
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: profile 맞춤 실시구간 문항 payload 조합

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
함수 내부 순서
1) test_configs 로드
2) if not test_configs -> 404
3) meta/variants 계산
4) variant loop 처리
5) if not all_items -> 400
6) payload 반환

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
load_custom_test_configs
(app/services/admin/common.py)
목적: custom_test row에서 검사 구성 로드

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
함수 내부 처리
1) _safe_json_loads(selected_scales_json) 로 selected_raw 생성
2) _normalize_selected_scale_test_configs(selected_raw) 로 selected_configs 생성
3) selected_configs 있으면 그대로 return
4) 없으면 fallback selected_scale_codes 정규화 후 fallback config 또는 [] return

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

app/services/admin/common.py)
